rules.rule_text:
rule NanoCore
{
	meta:
		author = " Kevin Breen <kevin@techanarchy.net>"
		date = "2014/04"
		ref = "http://malwareconfig.com/stats/NanoCore"
		maltype = "Remote Access Trojan"
		filetype = "exe"

	strings:
		$a = "NanoCore"
		$b = "ClientPlugin"
		$c = "ProjectData"
		$d = "DESCrypto"
		$e = "KeepAlive"
		$f = "IPNETROW"
		$g = "LogClientMessage"
		$h = "|ClientHost"
		$i = "get_Connected"
		$j = "#=q"
		$key = {43 6f 24 cb 95 30 38 39}

	condition:
		6 of them
}
